---
title: "27 March, 2026"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
a = c(1,2,3,4)
b = c(3,1,5,6)

difference = a - b
without_zeros_diff = difference[difference != 0]
positives_r = sum(without_zeros_diff > 0)
n_binom = length(without_zeros_diff)
binom.test(positives_r,n_binom)
```

```{r}
wilcox.test(a,b)
```

```{r}
kruskal.test(iris$Sepal.Length ~ iris$Species)
```
